Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 20 

CCW_LD_DT 

LABEL: CCW Load Date 

DESCRIPTION: The date source file was loaded to the CCW. 

SHORT NAME: CCW_LD_DT 

LONG NAME: CCW_LD_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) e.g., 31DEC2015 

COMMENT: States may resubmit T-MSIS data to CMS. This date indicates when the TAF was obtained by
